name: Caramel Nut Candy Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch square pan lightly with butter.
2. In the top of a double boiler, combine caramels and milk. Cook over hot water until the caramels are melted, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat. Add margarine; mix well.
4. Stir in powdered sugar; beat until smooth.
5. Stir in peanuts.
6. Press mixture into the greased pan using buttered fingers.
7. Refrigerate 1 to 2 hours or until firm. Cut into bars.
8. Store in refrigerator. Makes 18 bars.
